text_block_list.text:
It's finally the day of the Takamatsunomiya Kinen.
In the waiting room...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Curren! I'm looking forward to running with you
today!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Me too! Thanks for coming! ♪

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
As a hero, I'm always game for anything that'll lift
everyone's spirits!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I actually don't really get what we're doing, but I
posted like usual today!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, it was perfect! "Biko
Pegasus—running for justice!" I love it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Oh, that?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
"Her legs bring law wherever they may tread!
Onward, Biko Pegasus! Across the arid
wasteland!"

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: "Yahhh!"

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
"Area restored! Biko Pegasus returning to
headquarters!"

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I made that based on episode seventy-four of
Carrot Ranger, "Restore the Wasteland!"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: The editing was sooo good!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: That's because I copied you! For example...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"It's me, Curren. ♪ I'm gonna cast a spell on
you! ♪"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"One, two, three! ♪ Everyone fall in love with
me! ♪"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: "You looove me, right? Ehehe! ♪"

Curren Chan ends up pushing through by pouring
all her cuteness into her posts. She said she had a
plan, but...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I'd never really used any effects before... but now
that I've tried editing, it's actually pretty fun!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Now I can play around and recreate scenes from
Carrot Ranger! All my fellow hero fans really
loved it too!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...I'm glad you had fun with it, Biko. ♪

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: I have no regrets! But... the real battle starts here!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
So come at me, Curren! Let's have a good race
today!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna take you down head-on! In the name of
everyone awaiting my victory!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, does that mean... you're calling me your
enemy?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Oh! No, that's not what I meant!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's okay. I get it. ♪ Plus, me being your
enemy is fitting.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I can't see myself placing anywhere but first, after
all. ♪ Sorry, but you're gonna have to take the
loss this time.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: This win is mine!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Cause I'm dedicating this race to me!
